subject: A swirling vortex of dark purple and magenta energy consuming a faint humanoid silhouette at its center, depicting a life-drain spell in progress
description: The art is dominated by a churning vortex of violet, magenta, and deep purple energy, threaded with darker bruise-toned shadows. A faint, indistinct humanoid silhouette is visible at the center of the swirl, its form being warped or unraveled by the surrounding magical currents. The energy appears to draw inward, suggesting absorption or siphoning rather than emission. The background dissolves into near-black void at the edges, focusing all attention on the central magical event. There is no clear ground plane, sky, or architecture — the scene exists in an abstracted magical space.
foreground: swirling vortex of dark magical energy with a humanoid silhouette being consumed at its core
background: void of darkness bleeding into the edges of the magical swirl
emotion: anguished dissolution — the silhouette reads as caught and unmaking
